style.styleSentence: A gritty 90s East Coast boom bap track running at roughly 108 BPM featuring dusty drums with hard snare cracks and a foghorn bass line that mimics an upright bass stab, layered over a dark A minor piano loop and muted trumpet to create a sinister yet rubber-hose animated vibe reminiscent of black-and-white 1920s dockside cartoons.
style.vocalStyle: Aggressive male rap duo with raspy street vocals utilizing call-and-response ad-libs

sections.text:
So, they call me Big G with the capital G
I said, "Step into my crib and check my hundred-inch TV"
I got the Rolly with the ice, keep it on the freeze
And I know they ain't got it like this overseas
He said, "Ooh, I like your car"
And he said, "Oh, I like your chain"
And he said, "Damn, I like your shoes"
He said, "Yo, Big G, can I ride with you?"

And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
And I said, "No"
